notes: v0.5.3 — three quality-of-life fixes for Live Render. (1) with_flat_lighting helper temporarily disables UseSunForShading + DisplayShadows during every capture (live_render, live_stream, ai_watch) so a pure-white SU wall doesn't read as light-grey to Gemini and get re-rendered as a grey wall. Restore on exit even if write_image raises. (2) Auto-delete the raw SU view after Gemini returns (set live_render_keep_raw=true to keep both). Solves folder-clutter complaint — the AI render is what you want to keep, not the input. (3) Capture resolution dropdown (512/768/1024) and sane interval default 15s instead of 10s (rendering takes ~12s; smaller intervals just spam in_flight=true ticks). Cost meter now shows HKD too (US$x.xxxx + HK$y.yyy at 7.85 peg).
